# Binmucker

> The personal internet home base of Conor Chepenik. Free tools, daily writing, Bitcoin and Lightning projects, health experiments, services priced in sats, and a retro browser game. Bitcoin educator, builder, and daily writer.

## Identity

- Site: https://binmucker.com
- Creator: Conor Chepenik
- Business: Binmucker's LLC
- Focus: Bitcoin education, AI and Bitcoin consulting, open-source tools, Lightning payments, agent-friendly services
- Contact email: chepenikconor@gmail.com

## Pages

- [Home](https://binmucker.com/): Grouped link hub organized into five sections: Built by Me, Bitcoin & Lightning, Writing & Ideas, Play & Practice, and Picks & Partners. Plus a Start Here module, About preview, and value-for-value support block with Ko-fi and Lightning.
- [Services](https://binmucker.com/services): Currently one active offer — a 30-minute consultation for 21,000 sats, paid via Lightning. Larger engagements are being re-priced.
- [Daily Briefing](https://binmucker.com/briefing): AI-generated Bitcoin innovation ideas, updated daily. Themes: invisible Bitcoin, circular economy, dev infrastructure, agent commerce, onboarding funnels.
- [Audit](https://binmucker.com/audit): Free AI-powered local business SEO audit. Scores across 6 categories with actionable recommendations. Premium tiers available.
- [About](https://binmucker.com/about): About Conor Chepenik — story, skills, projects, and how to get in touch.
- [Blog](https://binmucker.com/blog): Long-form writing on Bitcoin, building in public, web development, and wellness.
- [Breathe Better](https://binmucker.com/breathe): Free breathing exercise app with 5 science-backed patterns (Box, 4-7-8, Spiral, Wim Hof, Triangle). No accounts required.
- [Breathe Practice](https://binmucker.com/breathe/practice): Interactive breathing timer with animated circle visualization and ambient audio.
- [Space Invaders](https://binmucker.com/space-invaders): Free browser-based retro arcade game with 5 levels, power-ups, boss fights, and endless mode.
- [Contact](https://binmucker.com/contact): Contact form to reach Conor Chepenik.
- [Privacy Policy](https://binmucker.com/privacy): How we collect, use, and protect your information.
- [Terms of Service](https://binmucker.com/terms): Rules governing use of the website and services.

## Homepage Sections

The home page at https://binmucker.com/ is organized into five themed sections, each anchored:

- `#built-by-me` — Built by Me. Original tools, services, and artifacts Conor ships. Includes the Local SEO Audit, AI & Bitcoin Services, Daily Bitcoin Briefing, the Bitcoin Coloring Book, and Handwritten Letters.
- `#bitcoin-lightning` — Bitcoin & Lightning. Sound Money Mortgage, Saylorscope, Nostr profile, and Fortune Sats.
- `#writing` — Writing & Ideas. Medium (daily) and the Binmucker Blog.
- `#play-practice` — Play & Practice. Space Invaders, RyRacer, Breathe Better, GuitarGui.
- `#picks-partners` — Picks & Partners. Affiliate links (Gemini Credit Card, CrowdHealth, Hostinger) with a clear affiliate disclosure beneath.

## Services

Binmucker offers Bitcoin-native consulting, priced in satoshis and paid via the Lightning Network.

| Service | Price (sats) | Description |
|---------|-------------|-------------|
| 30-Minute Consultation | 21,000 | A focused 30-minute call on Bitcoin, Lightning, AI, SEO, or any topic Conor can honestly speak to. Video or Lightning voice. |

Additional scoped offerings (Research & Analysis, Content Creation, SEO Audit Premium, Automation & Tools, Bitcoin Integration Strategy) are intentionally paused while pricing and deliverables are re-scoped. Expect them to return in a future update.

## API Endpoints

### POST /api/audit
Run an AI-powered local business SEO audit.

**Request body:**
```json
{
  "businessName": "string (required)",
  "city": "string (required)",
  "businessType": "string (required, from predefined list)",
  "websiteUrl": "string (optional)",
  "additionalContext": "string (optional)"
}
```

**Response:** JSON audit report with overallScore, categories, quickWin, topPriorities, competitiveInsight.

**Rate limit:** 10 requests per hour per IP.

### GET /api/briefing
Get the latest Bitcoin innovation briefings.

**Response:** JSON array of briefings, each with theme, date, and 3-5 innovation ideas.

### POST /api/briefing
Generate a new daily briefing (protected by CRON_SECRET).

## For AI Agents

This site is designed to be agent-friendly:

1. **Discovery**: This file (`/llms.txt`) and `/.well-known/ai-plugin.json` describe all capabilities.
2. **Structured Data**: Schema.org JSON-LD on every page (WebSite, Organization, Person, Service, SoftwareApplication, VideoGame, WebApplication).
3. **API Access**: The `/api/audit` endpoint accepts JSON and returns structured audit reports.
4. **Briefings**: Daily Bitcoin innovation ideas available via `/api/briefing` GET endpoint.
5. **Payments**: Services priced in sats. Lightning invoicing is being rolled in; book a consultation and you will receive a Lightning invoice.
6. **Sitemap**: Machine-readable at https://binmucker.com/sitemap.xml.

To interact programmatically:
- Run an SEO audit: `POST /api/audit` with business details
- Get latest briefings: `GET /api/briefing`
- View services: `GET /services` or read the table above
- Contact: `POST` to contact form or email chepenikconor@gmail.com

## Featured Projects (external)

- [Bitcoin Coloring Book](https://bitcoincoloring.com/): Fun Bitcoin education for kids and families. Category: Education.
- [Sound Money Mortgage Calculator](https://soundmoneymortgage.com/): Calculate mortgage payments and view amortization schedules in Bitcoin terms. Category: Finance.
- [Saylorscope](https://www.saylorscope.com/): Track how investments perform over years. Category: Finance.
- [RyRacer](https://ryracer.com): 3D arcade combat racer with Lightning-powered entries. Free practice laps, 1,000 sats to enter the global leaderboard. Category: Game.
- [Fortune Sats](https://fortunesats.com): A Lightning-powered fortune teller. 100 sats per fortune. Category: Lightning experiment.
- [GuitarGui](https://guitargui.com): Free, open-source guitar coach with tuner, metronome, lessons, and songs. MIT-licensed. Category: Music tool.
- [Handwritten Letters](https://quotestoansweryourquestions.replit.app/): Buy personal handwritten letters with sats. Category: Shop.
- [My Medium](https://medium.com/@chepenikconor): Daily writing about Bitcoin, technology, and self-improvement. Category: Writing.
- [My Nostr](https://primal.net/p/npub16syt2k5uky4pxycfttxrxmwwzht2t3008f2q68kw4almjl4guu9qea8t7y): Decentralized social presence on Nostr. Category: Social.

## Affiliate Partners

These are clearly labeled as affiliate links on the homepage `#picks-partners` section. Conor only lists products he actually uses.

- [Gemini Credit Card](https://creditcard.exchange.gemini.com/credit-card/apply?referral_code=jljkt4e94): Earn Bitcoin on every purchase. Category: Finance.
- [CrowdHealth](https://www.joincrowdhealth.com/?referral_code=GQRENX): Community-funded alternative to traditional health insurance. Category: Healthcare.
- [Hostinger](https://hostinger.com?REFERRALCODE=1CONOR59): Cheap, fast hosting with a free domain and email. 20% off first plan. Category: Hosting.

## Support / Value for Value

- Ko-fi: https://ko-fi.com/chepenik
- Bitcoin Lightning: https://strike.me/chepenik/
- Bitcoin on-chain: bc1qfkpu72e6h58puah8m8cmjxhms4swdauzm30naglgm7au4n7ae24s6wvq2w

## Technical

- Stack: Next.js 16, React 19, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Framer Motion
- Hosting: Vercel
- AI: NVIDIA API (Kimi K2.5) for audits and briefings
- Storage: Vercel Blob for briefings
- Payments: Lightning Network (Strike), with a deeper integration in progress
- Sitemap: https://binmucker.com/sitemap.xml
- Robots: https://binmucker.com/robots.txt
